message:
fix: add CSRF header to all raw fetch POST calls and CORS config (#9450)

When the RequireCSRF middleware was added to the /api group (#8738),
only the ApiClient class and authFetch were updated to include the
X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest header. All raw fetch() POST calls
scattered across hooks and components were left without the header,
causing 403 "CSRF header required" errors on any state-changing
request that bypasses the api client.

Changes:
- Add X-Requested-With to CORS AllowHeaders so cross-origin setups
  (e.g. Vite dev server on :5174 -> backend on :8080) allow the
  custom header through preflight
- Add X-KC-Client-Auth to CORS AllowHeaders for attribution proxy
- Add X-Requested-With header to all raw fetch() POST calls that
  target /api/ endpoints (useActiveUsers, useAlerts, useClusterGroups,
  useDataSource, useGitHubPipelines, useNPSSurvey, useNotificationAPI,
  usePersistence, useSelfUpgrade, AlertsContext, DrasiReactiveGraph,
  GitHubTokenSection)
- Update api.post() to accept and merge custom headers from options
  so callers like createRequest can pass X-KC-Client-Auth

Fixes #9439

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1010,6 +1010,7 @@ export function AlertsProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
         method: 'POST',
         headers: {
           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+          'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
           Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
         body: JSON.stringify({ alert, channels }),
         signal: AbortSignal.timeout(FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS) })
@@ -1053,6 +1054,7 @@ export function AlertsProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
               method: 'POST',
               headers: {
                 'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
                 Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
               body: JSON.stringify({ alert, channels }),
               signal: AbortSignal.timeout(FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS) })

@@ -150,6 +150,7 @@ export function useSelfUpgrade() {
         method: 'POST',
         headers: {
           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+          'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
           ...(token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {}) },
         body: JSON.stringify({ imageTag }),
         signal: AbortSignal.timeout(SELF_UPGRADE_TIMEOUT_MS) })

@@ -277,7 +277,7 @@ function useApiDataSourceInternal(
 
       const response = await fetch(url, {
         method,
-        headers: method === 'POST' ? { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } : undefined,
+        headers: method === 'POST' ? { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest' } : undefined,
         body: method === 'POST' && params ? JSON.stringify(params) : undefined,
         signal: AbortSignal.timeout(FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS) })
